query:
SELECT 
  b.id,
  b.guestName,
  b.guestEmail,
  b.experienceDate,
  b.mealType,
  b.numberOfGuests,
  b.paymentStatus,
  h.hostName,
  h.email as hostEmail,
  h.cuisine
FROM bookings b
JOIN hostListings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id
WHERE b.paymentStatus = 'PAID' 
  AND b.experienceDate > NOW()
ORDER BY b.experienceDate ASC

  h.cuisine
FROM bookings b
